name: FocusSense Activity Bridge
description: Secure, local-only bridge reporting active tabs and idle states to FocusSense.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src ws://127.0.0.1:8765 ws://localhost:8765 http://127.0.0.1:8765 http://localhost:8765
